title: Today at GTC, we announced that we’re building NVIDIA ecosystem-native models and an optimized instance of our agentic North platform to meet the growing demand for secure, privately deployed AI systems alongside @nvidia. These custom models will be optimized for NVIDIA’s latest architecture and software ecosystem, including NVIDIA DGX Spark – bringing a high-performance, locally run enterprise AI workstation to Spark owners and customers. Learn more on our blog, and visit us at the GTC South Market Lot, Booth #7027: https://lnkd.in/e-48MbTG #NVIDIAGTC

content.full_text:
Post title: Today at GTC, we announced that we’re building NVIDIA ecosystem-native models and an optimized instance of our agentic North platform to meet the growing demand for secure, privately deployed AI systems alongside @nvidia. These custom models will be optimized for NVIDIA’s latest architecture and software ecosystem, including NVIDIA DGX Spark – bringing a high-performance, locally run enterprise AI workstation to Spark owners and customers. Learn more on our blog, and visit us at the GTC South Market Lot, Booth #7027: https://lnkd.in/e-48MbTG #NVIDIAGTC
